articles.title: Fuel Prices in China Near the  ¥9 Era , but Not Across the Board Yet
articles.query: (OPEC OR oil production OR energy crisis)
articles.summary: China auto market Fuel Prices in China Near the “¥9 Era,” but Not Across the Board Yet Edited by Yara From Gasgoo | March 25 , 2026 14:55 BJT f SHARE TWEET in SHARE SHARE Scan for mobile Gasgoo Munich- So far in 2026, refined oil prices have been adjusted six times in China—mostly hikes. On March 9, gasoline and diesel prices rose by 695 yuan and 670 yuan per ton, respectively. Then, on March 23, domestic gasoline and diesel prices climbed by 1,160 yuan and 1,115 yuan per ton—less than markets had anticipated.
